title: ocotea boissieriana
intro: Ocotea boissieriana, also known as Bois Serole or Ocotea, is a type of tropical evergreen tree native to Madagascar, belonging to the family Lauraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Ocotea boissieriana include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the essential oil extracted from the plant's leaves is used to create tonics, teas, and topical creams, often used to promote relaxation and well-being.
